2021-22 Northern Iowa Panthers Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 20-12 (14-4, 1st in MVC MBB)

Coach: Ben Jacobson

PS/G: 74.5 (82nd of 358)

PA/G: 71.0 (231st of 358)

SRS: 5.79 (103rd of 358)

SOS: 3.43 (105th of 358)

ORtg: 108.0 (62nd of 358)

DRtg: 103.0 (249th of 358)

Preseason Odds: Championship +30000
